title: rubus quadraticus
intro: Rubus quadraticus, also known as the dwarf dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus quadraticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus quadraticus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
